title: The Heart of the Freljord
identity: Braum roams the frostbitten wilds of the Freljord, lending his shield to those in need. He deploys defensive utility, close-range attacks, and an army of poros to protect his allies and freeze enemies in their tracks.
playstyle: Bruiser. Braum roams the frostbitten wilds of the Freljord, lending his shield to those in need. He deploys defensive utility, close-range attacks, and an army of poros to protect his allies and freeze enemies in their tracks.
strengths: Defensive protector identity with sturdy space control.
Can make aggressive partners safer by covering approaches.
Straightforward team value: durability, protection, and control.
weaknesses: May need a partner who supplies speed or layered mix.
